title: calonemorchis hastata
intro: Calonemorchis hastata, also known as the hastate calonemorchis, is a type of orchid native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of constipation. The health benefits of Calonemorchis hastata include its potential to reduce inflammation, lower blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the roots and leaves in hot water, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
